---
title: "About"
description: "Short bio and expertise of Your Name"     # CHANGE
---

![](/images/about.png){fig-align="center" width="800"}

{{< include /chunks/intro.qmd >}}

Check out my **Resume** and **CV** here:

<center>
<a href="resume.pdf" class="btn btn-primary" role="button" target="_blank" style="width: 140px; margin: 5px;"><i class="bi bi-person-badge"></i> Resume </a>
<a href="cv.pdf" class="btn btn-primary" role="button" target="_blank" style="width: 140px; margin: 5px;"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i> CV </a>
</center>

### [**Projects**](listing-grid.qmd)

Brief description of your research focus and how your projects are funded or motivated.

1. **Research Area One**: Description of your first main project or research thrust.

2. **Research Area Two**: Description of your second main project or research thrust.

### Other Sections

- [**Blog**](listing-default.qmd): Write blog posts on topics related to your research or tools you use and build.
- [**Papers**](papers.qmd): Collect your publications here, including journal papers, conference papers, and preprints.
- [**Talks**](talks.qmd): Collect your conference talks here, including slides and posters.

## Expertise

#### Degrees

- (Ongoing) **Ph.D.** - *Doctor of Philosophy* in [Your Field](https://yourprogram.edu) at [Your University](https://youruniversity.edu).
- **M.S.** - *Master of Science* in Your Field at [Your University](https://youruniversity.edu).
- **B.S.** - *Bachelor of Science* in Your Field at [Your University](https://youruniversity.edu).

#### Skills

{{< include /chunks/skills.qmd >}}

#### Languages

- Your native language - Native
- English - Proficient

## Personal Life

A short personal note — where you're based, your interests, or whatever you'd like to share.
